audit_items.proof_trace: The post-loop guard at lines 271-273 (`if (!isAssetOutPriceValid) { eligibleAssetsIdx = 0; }`) is applied after all iterations complete, reliably zeroing eligible assets when the assetOut price is not valid. `isAssetOutPriceValid` initialises to `false` and is only set to `true` if the loop encounters `s_assetOut` (which must be in `s_allowlistedAssets` for `whenAssetOutConfigured` to pass) with a valid oracle price; the guard therefore fires in every case where validity cannot be confirmed. Additionally, `performUpkeep` independently reverts on an invalid assetOut price when eligible assets are passed (line 315), providing defence-in-depth.
